boundary.title: Phase 1 surface boundary and applicability baseline

features.description: Boundary feature: define and govern the administrator UIX surface. Current implementation status: partial. Governed by SPEC-1074.

features.description: Governed feature for authoritative applicability and scope classification across admin API, public API, admin UIX, public UIX, runtime, operator, and release-facing surfaces. Current implementation status: absent. Governed by SPEC-1078.
features.title: Surface applicability and scope classification

features.description: Boundary feature: define and govern the authenticated administrator control-plane API surface. Current implementation status: absent. Governed by SPEC-1076.

features.description: Admin API boundary and contract feature: define and govern exclusion of public API concerns from the administrator control-plane API surface. Current implementation status: absent. Governed by SPEC-1076.
